violations.description: DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning under and around equipment.
PREMISES (1 pts): Articles not necessary for the operation of the food service facility were noted stored in the facility. | PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung up when not in use
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelves racks reachin cooler interiors and exteriors and other equipment exteriors noted not clean.
PERSON IN CHARGE (4 pts): The manager and/or person in charge during the course of the inspection did not possess a Certified Manager's Certificate within the appropriate time.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
